description_long: This sconce features a symmetrical double-arm design with two bell-shaped lamp housings suspended from chains. The central mounting plate is circular and adorned with a ring of metallic studs, giving it a decorative touch. Each arm consists of a chain that arches outward from the center, connecting to a shallow, inverted dome at the top and a bell-shaped lamp at the bottom. The lamps have a glossy, dark metallic finish with subtle red accents near their bases, suggesting a modern or industrial aesthetic. The chains and mounting hardware are robust and visually prominent, emphasizing durability and style. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with a sleek, reflective surface and a hint of ornamental detail.
description: A double-arm sconce with bell-shaped lamps suspended by chains from a central, studded mounting plate. The fixture has a glossy dark metallic finish with red accents and a robust, industrial look.
description_view_0: Front view showing both bell-shaped lamps, the central studded mounting plate, and the symmetrical chain arms.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the bell-shaped lamps and the arch of the chains, with the mounting plate visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the mounting plate and the symmetrical arrangement of the chains and lamps.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile of the lamps and the chain structure.
attribute_fixture_design: Industrial with a touch of vintage flair, featuring exposed chains, a studded central plate, and glossy metallic finishes with subtle red accents.
